The packet separates publishable language from unresolved math, axiom, and contradiction obligations.
plain_english: BC2 Grace External Salvation can't be earned BC7 Info Conservation Nothing is destroyed BC8 Voluntary Coupling Free will required From information primacy to the thermodynamics of salvation. Five claims that bridge physics and soteriology. Layer 2 derives consequences from the seven Tier 1 axioms. These aren't assumed — they're logically forced by the foundation. Each theorem creates a constraint that narrows the space of viable worldviews. By BC8, only systems with external grace, information conservation, and voluntary coupling s... In simpler terms, the article is trying to establish: Layer 2: Derived Theorems & Laws — Proof Explorer ← Main Index | Proof Explorer THEOPHYSICS Core Axioms Derived Extended Closure Layer 2 Derived Derived Axioms A1.3 Information Primacy Distinction IS information Derived Theorems T3.1 Coherence ↚ Self Moral... The math layer has been extracted separately so equations can be translated and checked without blurring them into the prose.

contradictions.text: Epiphenomenalism Contradicts Landauer's principle & all of computation.
Love cannot be coerced." Grace is available to all (BC2), but must be received voluntarily.
Forced salvation is a contradiction — love that is coerced is not love.
Ring 2 — Supporting Evidence Deeper dives and formal treatments No connections mapped yet.
Ring 3 — Broader Context Related topics across the framework No connections mapped yet.

math_items.expression: → BC8 Coupling must be voluntary (love ≠ coercion)
Experimental protocols with σ thresholds, replication, pre-registration.
H(X) = −Σ p(x) log 2 p(x) — Shannon entropy as fundamental measure
"In a closed system, coherence cannot spontaneously increase. dC/dt ≤ 0."
Demonstrate self-generated sign flip — find a unitary operation that changes σ: −1 → +1
Unitary evolution is invertible. Information in = information out. Always.
G(t) = G offer (t) · V(Ψ) where V ∈ [0, 1]
Grace flows when V(Ψ) > 0. The soul must open to receive. V is agent-caused, not computed from prior state.
"Receiving = works" Receiving a gift ≠ earning it. Faith is the hand that receives, not the cause of grace.

axiom_items.text: Every axiom is tagged with its tier — how it is justified, not how confident we are in it.

claims.text: Layer 2: Derived Theorems & Laws — Proof Explorer ← Main Index | Proof Explorer THEOPHYSICS Core Axioms Derived Extended Closure Layer 2 Derived Derived Axioms A1.3 Information Primacy Distinction IS information Derived Theorems T3.1 Coherence ↚ Self Moral Second Law Boundary Conditions BC2 Grace External Salvation can't be earned BC7 Info Conservation Nothing is destroyed BC8 Voluntary Coupling Free will required...
Each theorem creates a constraint that narrows the space of viable worldviews.

Derived Axioms A1.3 — DERIVED — Chain Position 3/188 Information Primacy "Distinguishability IS information; therefore information is ontologically primitive." Matter and energy reduce to informational patterns; information cannot reduce further.
Eliminative Materialism The claim "information is fiction" is itself information.
Nihilism Denial of reality is a meaningful informational claim.

Cross-Domain Bridges Wheeler: "It from Bit" Landauer: kT ln 2 Bekenstein: S = A/4ℓ P ² Holographic Principle AdS/CFT (Maldacena) Shannon Entropy Kolmogorov Complexity Fisher Information John 1:1 (Logos) Col 1:17 (holds together) IIT (Φ measure) Quantum Darwinism Derived Theorems T3.1 — THEOREM — Chain Position 25/188 Coherence Cannot Self-Increase "In a closed system, coherence cannot spontaneously increase. dC/dt...

Liouville's Theorem Jarzynski Equality Prigogine dissipative Algorithmic Info Theory Boundary Conditions BC2 — BOUNDARY CONDITION — Chain Position 59/188 Grace External to System "Grace function G ext (t) is an exogenous coupling term that opens an otherwise closed moral/coherence subsystem." The thermodynamic proof that salvation cannot be earned.

Landauer's principle Open vs. closed systems Eph 2:8-9 (by grace) John 15:5 (without me) Basin-crossing dynamics Channel capacity theorem BC7 — BOUNDARY CONDITION — Chain Position 64/188 Information Conservation "Information is preserved through all transformations." Quantum mechanics is unitary — information is conserved.
The No-Hiding Theorem (Braunstein & Pati 2007): information cannot vanish — it either stays in the system or moves to correlations.

Defeat Conditions Show information is genuinely destroyed in black holes (resolve paradox against conservation) Demonstrate unitary violation — find a process where quantum information is permanently lost Violate the No-Hiding Theorem — find information that disappears rather than relocating Show souls can be annihilated — prove personal identity can cease entirely What Collapses If BC7 Fails Collapse Cascade Soul...
Conway & Kochen's Free Will Theorem (2006): if experimenters have free will, so do particles.

Cross-Domain Bridges Conway-Kochen FWT Agent causation Quantum collapse Modal logic: ◇V=1 Libet veto power Game theory (Nash) Retrocausality Eph 2:8-9 The Filter Chain Each Layer 2 claim narrows the space of possible worldviews.

open_obligations: Review suspected contradictions/tensions and mark as resolved, live tension, or true contradiction.
Translate each extracted equation into plain English and verify the isomorphism claim.
Attach evidence, axiom links, and falsification criteria to the strongest claims.
